global_upgrade_blocked_reason: cross-repo heterogeneity: 1/3 repos threshold_dependent_persists (gl-electron-tool). 3rd-repo replication complete (ai-governance-framework: mechanism_stable_candidate). Mechanism is condition-dependent, not uniformly transferable. No claim upgrade beyond condition-dependent wording.
arm2_differentiation_note: arm-2 (one-cause-one-fix, narrative_density_threshold=0.5) produced identical values to arm-1 in both harness modes. The parameter is not causal in the current harness metric. A different one-cause-one-fix variable is needed to demonstrate causal differentiation.
external_claim: Current AI governance effect is observable but condition-dependent.
next_required_step: no further replication required; heterogeneity (1/3 threshold_dependent) explains condition-dependence; external claim wording is accurate and stable
